On behalf of HHS, CDC will provide $10 billion from the PHSSEF to states to support COVID-19 screening testing for teachers, staff, and students to assist schools in reopening safely for in-person instruction. 
CDC COVID-19 State, Tribal, Local, and Territorial (STLT) Funding 
The CDC COVID-19 STLT Funding page shows COVID-19 funding by jurisdiction, award, and the four COVID-19 supplemental appropriations.
Additional reports can be found on the CDC stacks website.
September 4, 2024
